/usr/bin/ar qc libMCORE.a CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/LuaIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MAes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MAesEax.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MAlgorithm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MCriticalSection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MCurrentPathSubstitutor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MDes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MDictionary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MDynamicLibrary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MErrorEnum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MEvent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MFileNameAndLineNumber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MFindFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MGuid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MIniFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MIso8825.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MJavaEnv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MMD5Checksum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MMath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MMessageCatalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MMessageFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MMutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MProgressMonitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MRandomGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MRegexp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MScopeSaviors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MSemaphore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MSerialPort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MSharedString.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MSockOptEnum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStreamExternalMemory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStreamFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStreamMemory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStreamProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStreamSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStreamSocketBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MStreamSocketUdp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MSynchronizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MThreadCurrent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MThreadWorker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MTimeRecurrent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MTimeRecurrentYearly.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MTimeSpan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MTimeZone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MTimer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MTypeCasting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MUtilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MVariant.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MVariantParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MVersion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCORE.dir/MXmlDocument.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libMCORE.a
